name: Alice In Chains
bio: Alice In Chains built a heavy, emotionally durable catalog that continues to earn through rock streaming, nostalgia demand, and long-term playlist rotation.
notable_for: Dark harmonies, grunge-era influence, and one of the most replayed heavy-rock catalogs of the 1990s.
career_highlight: Songs from their early albums still anchor major rock playlists and catalog listening decades later.
revenue_drivers: Rock catalog streaming remains steady across multiple generations of listeners.
Grunge-era nostalgia keeps core tracks in editorial and user playlists.
The band's recognizable sound supports sync and documentary-style licensing.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Alice In Chains's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Alice In Chains's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
